title: Mob Farm Trap
description: The mod adds the functionality of two items and a configurable switch.
body:
### This mod adds the functionality of two items and a configurable switch.

## **Blocks**

Magic Bucket: Can release magic snow, which cannot be prevented from falling into the snow by wearing leather boots, and will immediately freeze (reduces jump power and movement speed) and damage creatures trapped in snow at a rate of 5 damage every 0.5 seconds;

Induced block: This block has no collision volume, but in the solid pathfinding AI, the block is considered a "passable block" that has no material and can block water sources.

## **Configurable Features**

The experience orb within the adsorption range of the funnel and funnel minecart is adsorbed and flows into the funnel as an enchanted bottle (disabled in Config).

~~_**The above is a machine flip.**_~~

### 该模组添加了两个物品和一个可配置开关的功能。

## **方块**

魔法细雪桶：可放出魔法细雪，魔法细雪无法通过穿戴皮革靴阻止陷入细雪中，陷入细雪中会立刻进入冻结状态（减少跳跃力和移动速度）并以每 0.5 秒造成5点伤害的频率伤害陷入细雪的生物；

诱导方块：该方块没有碰撞体积，但是在实体寻路 AI 中，会将该方块作为“可通行的方块”，该方块没有材质，并可阻挡水源。

## **可配置功能**

漏斗与漏斗矿车吸附范围内的经验球会被吸附并且以附魔之瓶的形式流入漏斗（可在 Config 中关闭）。
